title: How to Search for Resources - 211info
text: There are two ways to find resources using the 211info website: the Search bar and Guided Search. Both the Search bar and Guided Search can be found on our website home page . You can also click “Get Help” at the top of this page. The document below will guide you through the steps to find the resources and information you are looking for: How to search using the 211info Website – English If you need more support or if a link on our website is not working correctly, please dial 211 (866-698-6155). Language interpreters are available to help you. Find additional ways to contact the 211info team on our Contact page .
